summary: Completed testing of Kiosk Sound Effects feature. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend Sound tab fully functional with toggle, volume slider, sound pack selection, test buttons, rate limit, and quiet hours settings.
passed_tests: GET /api/settings/sound - returns default config (enabled:false, volume:70, sound_pack:default)
PUT /api/settings/sound - admin can enable sounds and update all config fields
PUT /api/settings/sound - requires authentication (401 without token)
GET /api/sounds/packs - returns list of available sound packs with events
GET /api/sounds/default/start.wav - returns WAV file with Content-Disposition header
GET /api/sounds/default/one_eighty.wav - returns WAV file
GET /api/sounds/default/checkout.wav - returns WAV file
GET /api/sounds/default/bust.wav - returns WAV file
GET /api/sounds/default/win.wav - returns WAV file
GET /api/sounds/default/invalid.wav - returns 404
POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/sound - triggers sound event via WS broadcast for all events
POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/sound with invalid event - returns 400
Sound WAV files are <= 0.8s duration (start:0.50s, one_eighty:0.70s, checkout:0.40s, bust:0.50s, win:0.80s)
Sound WAV files are reasonable file size (< 50KB each, largest is ~31KB)
Sound WAV files are valid format (22050Hz, 16-bit, mono)
Frontend: Admin Settings has Sound tab with toggle, volume slider, sound pack, test buttons, rate limit, quiet hours
Frontend: Sound toggle OFF hides all sub-settings (only toggle + save visible)
Frontend: Enabling sound toggle shows volume, pack selection, test buttons, rate limit, quiet hours
Frontend: Test sound buttons present (Start, 180!, Checkout, Bust, Sieg)
Frontend: Quiet hours toggle reveals time inputs (VON/BIS)
Frontend: Kiosk page loads useSoundManager hook without errors
seed_data_present: Sound files generated in /data/assets/sounds/default/ (start.wav, one_eighty.wav, checkout.wav, bust.wav, win.wav)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kiosk Sound Effects feature fully tested and working. Sound is OFF by default (DEFAULT_SOUND_CONFIG.enabled=false). Key endpoints: GET/PUT /api/settings/sound, GET /api/sounds/packs, GET /api/sounds/{pack}/{event}.wav, POST /api/kiosk/{board_id}/sound. WAV files are synthetically generated pure Python in sound_generator.py (22050Hz, 16-bit, mono, <= 0.8s duration). Frontend useSoundManager hook uses Web Audio API for playback with autoplay-unlock on first touch. The sound_event is broadcast via WS from start-game and end-game endpoints in kiosk.py.
